hero.name: Rocio Mendez
hero.description: I design and build AI products, scalable backend systems, and cloud infrastructure. I work across the full stack of delivery: architecture, implementation, deployment, and iteration.

projects.sectionSubtitle: Real systems, AI-driven products, and backend platforms designed for scale.

svant.title: Svant / SvantLite
svant.description: Production-ready emissions accounting platform. I built features for carbon data tracking, reporting, and operational follow-through.

chatai.title: Chat AI
chatai.description: AI chatbot for advertising metrics using NLP, embeddings, and BigQuery integrations to surface real-time business insights.

scoring.title: Scoring Tool
scoring.description: Automated multimedia evaluation system. AI models analyzed advertising content and produced performance scores at scale.

superhumans.title: SuperHumans
superhumans.description: AI-based talent selection system with machine learning models for automated candidate evaluation and ranking.

medinova.title: MEDINOVA
medinova.description: Medical and administrative system with AI models for sepsis detection and ICU mortality prediction.

experience.sectionSubtitle: A path centered on software engineering, AI systems, and production-ready delivery.

wildcat.description: End-to-end backend development, Azure architecture, deployments, and QA across multiple environments. Built systems for events, worked closely with frontend, and contributed to security decisions.

docente.description: Designed and taught AI tools courses across two engineering faculties, connecting technical concepts with practical application.

super.description: Built end-to-end AI systems integrating classification models, chatbots, OCR, NLP, LLMs, computer vision, SSO, and analytics dashboards.

coder.description: Supported students through technical mentoring, assignment reviews, and active follow-up during the learning process.

conae.description: Taught classes on spatial data usage and satellite imagery interpretation at Argentina's National Space Agency.

prefectura.description: Led legacy system reengineering and migration work while building new software and technical documentation.

about.bio: I am a Systems Engineer and developer focused on artificial intelligence, backend engineering, and cloud infrastructure. My work is centered on building robust, efficient systems that are ready for real use.
certifications: AI Security and Software Protection - Santander Academy (2025)
ML Foundation & ML for NLP - AWS Academy (2024)
Git: Collaborative Development and OOP - Educacion IT (2021)

contact.heading: Let's build together
contact.subheading: If you have a product, an idea, or a technical challenge, let's talk and turn it into something solid.
